executiveSummary: Chico Plumbing has the name recognition advantage — when someone in Chico needs a plumber, 'Chico Plumbing' is likely one of the first searches they'll try. That brand-name keyword alignment is incredibly valuable. But your current website isn't capitalizing on it.

The biggest issue: your site is still on HTTP — not HTTPS. Google has been penalizing non-secure sites since 2018, and in 2026 most browsers show a 'Not Secure' warning to visitors. Beyond that, there's no meta description, no schema markup, only 3 pages total, and the heading hierarchy is broken. The site is built on Duda but barely scratches the surface of what the platform can do.

Plumbing is one of the most competitive local service categories, but it's also one of the highest-intent — when someone's pipe bursts at 2 AM, they're calling the first plumber that shows up. With the right technical fixes and content strategy, Chico Plumbing can own that search position in Butte County.

assessment.title: Website Analysis — chicoplumbing.com
points: Brand name perfectly matches local search intent ('Chico Plumbing').
Only 3 pages total — extremely thin content.

assessment.title: Critical SEO Gaps
points: No HTTPS — still serving over HTTP. 'Not Secure' warning shown to visitors.
No meta description — Google generates its own snippet from page content.
No schema markup at all — no LocalBusiness, no Service, no FAQ.
Only 3 pages — no service pages, no area pages, no blog.
Broken heading hierarchy — H-tags not properly nested.
No Google Business Profile optimization apparent.
No social media integration or review display.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Chico plumbing market is competitive with multiple established companies.
Most competitors have significantly more content and better technical SEO.
The 'Chico Plumbing' brand name is a massive keyword advantage if leveraged properly.
Earl's Performance Plumbing has 159 pages — content gap is significant.
Emergency plumbing searches have extremely high conversion rates.
First-page local pack positioning drives 80%+ of clicks.

findings.finding: Site serves over HTTP — 'Not Secure' warning displayed to visitors
No meta description on any page
Zero schema markup — no LocalBusiness, Service, or FAQ
Only 3 pages total — competitors have 50-150+ pages
H-tags not properly nested — hurts SEO structure signals
Domain perfectly matches local search intent — huge advantage
Duda platform is capable — site just needs proper buildout

strategy.title: Phase 1: Critical Fixes & Foundation (Months 1-2)
actions: Write compelling meta descriptions for all pages.
Implement full LocalBusiness schema with complete NAP data.
Fix heading hierarchy across all pages.
Create dedicated service pages (drain cleaning, water heaters, leak repair, sewer, repiping, etc.).
Set up Google Search Console and verify ownership.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content Expansion (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch blog targeting plumbing keywords (4 posts/mo).
Create service area pages for Chico, Paradise, Oroville, Durham, etc.
Add customer testimonials and review display.
Implement FAQ schema for common plumbing questions.
Build citation consistency across home service directories.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Market Dominance (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting emergency plumbing keywords.
Video content showcasing services and expertise.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.
Seasonal campaigns (winter pipe freezing, spring inspections).
Service area expansion targeting neighboring counties.

pricingIntro: Chico Plumbing has the single biggest advantage in local SEO: your domain name IS the search query. People literally type 'Chico plumbing' into Google. But right now, the site isn't set up to capitalize on that. The HTTPS fix, schema implementation, and content buildout would transform your online visibility within 60-90 days.
about: Ridge Cell Repair LLC is a California-based digital marketing and business analysis firm specializing in helping service-industry businesses grow their online presence and generate more leads. We focus on practical, results-driven strategies rather than flashy marketing that doesn't convert.
Our approach is data-first: we research your market, identify what your competitors are doing (and not doing), and build a strategy that delivers real business outcomes.
What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work — no layers of account managers.
